element_introduction_order.mastery_context: players must locate torn-up Gwar concert tickets scattered across Highland
navigating various locations within the town setting
extensive trial-and-error required to obtain items and crack obscure puzzles

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: lengthy junk hunt with extended puzzle-solving phases requiring patience and thumb speed

difficulty_curve.early_game: straightforward introduction to controls and basic exploration
difficulty_curve.mid_game: escalating puzzle complexity and obscure item requirements
notable_spikes: puzzle obscurity wall - extensive trial-and-error to discover item combinations
ticket location scatter - players must thoroughly explore Highland to find all ticket pieces

notable_level_patterns.description: town exploration area with detailed background art featuring incomplete TV set, pizza box, and environmental details visible in unused graphics
warning screen establishing the show's tone before gameplay begins, with dialogue sequences between characters

sources_used: tcrf - Beavis and Butt-Head (SNES) - The Cutting Room Floor
